infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AiCara uses your location to provide location-aware responses and recommendations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AiCara uses continuous location access to keep your AI companion aware of where you are.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: AiCara uses continuous location access to keep your AI companion aware of where you are.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: AiCara uses background location access for location-aware responses.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: AiCara uses your location to provide location-aware responses and recommendations.
